testcase.name: test_get_user_me_creates_default
testcase.failure:
def test_get_user_me_creates_default(): # Test that getting /users/me creates the demo user if not exists response = client.get("/users/me") > assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401 Unauthorized]>.status_code
tests\test_main.py:50: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_update_user_me
testcase.failure:
def test_update_user_me(): # Update user profile updates = { "full_name": "Updated Name", "institution": "Updated Hospital" } response = client.put("/users/me", json=updates) > assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401 Unauthorized]>.status_code
tests\test_main.py:62: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_read_batches_empty
testcase.failure:
def test_read_batches_empty(): response = client.get("/batches") > assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401 Unauthorized]>.status_code
tests\test_main.py:73: AssertionError
